plan_metadata.name: Sample Adaptive Card Notification Remote Debug

steps.description: Type the text 'Adapative Card Notification' into the search input field located at the top of the "Samples" tab within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code.

Click the "Create" button for the "Adaptive Card Notification" sample in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension interface within Visual Studio Code.And input ${{var:app_name:adaptive-card-notifi}} into the run time variable.

parameters.sample:
=== Generated Script ===
Language: bash

```bash
env_file="/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/adaptive-card-notification/env/.env.dev"
command_file="/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/adaptive-card-notification/post.sh"

if [ ! -f "$env_file" ]; then
    echo "Environment file not found: $env_file" >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Get BOT_FUNCTION_ENDPOINT value
endpoint=$(grep '^BOT_FUNCTION_ENDPOINT=' "$env_file" | cut -d'=' -f2- | tr -d '"')
if [ -z "$endpoint" ]; then
    echo "BOT_FUNCTION_ENDPOINT not found in $env_file" >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Remove trailing slash if any
endpoint=$(echo "$endpoint" | sed 's:/*$::')

# Build full URL
full_url="$endpoint/api/default-notification"

# Write POST command to file
cat << EOF > "$command_file"
curl -X POST "$full_url"
EOF

chmod +x "$command_file"
echo "POST command saved to $command_file"
cat "$command_file"
```

=== Execution Results ===
Exit Code: 0

=== STDOUT ===
POST command saved to /home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/adaptive-card-notification/post.sh

✓ Script executed successfully

steps.description: @code open file `/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/${{var:app_name}}cation/env/.env.dev`, get the value of key BOT_FUNCTION_ENDPOINT, set the value as base url and add api `api/default-notification` to a full url, then put the command sending a post request to this url into a file and save, command file path is `/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/${{var:app_name}}cation/post.sh`
@assertion there is text "New Event Occurred!" exists.
